visual_description: The audio is filled with a tense and suspenseful atmosphere, dominated by a low, pulsing electronic score. The music is slow and deliberate, creating a feeling of anticipation and seriousness. A close-up, profile shot shows a man in a dimly lit environment. He has dark hair and is wearing an in-ear monitor, with a thin black wire visible. He looks intently off-screen with a serious expression. The background is dark and out of focus. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing more of the man's face as he continues to stare forward with a focused and somber look. The lighting remains low, casting shadows across his features. The shot changes again, now showing the man from a slightly different angle in profile. He brings his hand up to his ear, adjusting the in-ear monitor. The background is a dark, indistinct space. The white Chinese text remains in the top left corner. The camera cuts to a frontal, medium close-up of the man. He is now wearing large, over-the-ear headphones and is looking down at a computer screen just out of frame. His expression is one of intense concentration as he stares into the monitor.
